title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at BikeDekho

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at BikeDekho
jsonLd.description:
BikeDekho invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Faridabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About BikeDekho:
BikeDekho is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BikeDekho!
